name: BWX Technologies, Inc.

investment_theses.company_type: Nuclear Components / SMR Development / Naval Propulsion

content: BWX Technologies, Inc. is a leading supplier of nuclear components and fuel to the U.S. government, providing technical and manufacturing services to support the nation's nuclear fleet and national security programs. The company specializes in the design and manufacture of precision nuclear components, including reactor cores and steam generators, for the U.S. Navy's nuclear-powered submarines and aircraft carriers. Additionally, BWXT is a pioneer in the development of small modular reactors (SMRs) and advanced nuclear technologies for commercial power generation and space exploration, while also providing specialized nuclear medicine and environmental restoration services.
